use_cases: Social media influencer profile display with animated engagement metrics and social links
Creator portfolio landing page showcasing personal brand with experience progression
Team member showcase cards for agency or product websites
User dashboard profile section with follower stats and follow/unfollow toggle
Community directory listing with multi-platform social integration
ai_summary: A polished creator profile card component featuring animated stat counters (likes, posts, views), an animated experience progress bar, and social media link integration for Instagram, Twitter, and Threads. Includes interactive follow button with toggle state, gradient background imagery, and hover effects. Designed for showcasing personal brands, influencer profiles, or team member cards with professional metrics display.
